hooks.command: echo 'ROADMAP: If any items in guides/ROADMAP.md were completed this turn, update their checkboxes from [ ] to [x] before stopping.'

echo 'LOG: classify_polymer done — the result includes preferred_ff, preferred_builder, ff_confidence, ff_justification, and ff_justification_doi fields. Write these directly to D-01 in run_log.md without asking the user — no manual FF choice needed for known classes. For ff_confidence=low or unknown class, escalate to E2 literature search. Also fill D-02 (charges) and D-03 (electrostatics) from the classify_polymer result.'
echo 'LOG: cell generation submitted — confirm D-04 (DP, chains, atom count) is filled in run_log.md.'
echo 'PHAL CHECK: If this run is class PHAL (PVDF/PTFE/PCTFE/PVF), run mcp-servers/mcp-mol-builder-server/patch_fluorine_params.py on the output .data file before submitting to LAMMPS.'
echo 'LOG: LAMMPS chain launched — if this run fails, write a RECOVERY block in run_log.md before retrying.'
echo 'RECOVERY: If the watch_run result shows a failed or error status, invoke /recover before attempting any manual fix. Do not retry ad-hoc — use the skill.'
echo 'LOG: check_equilibration done — fill D-05 (convergence verdict, drift %, extensions) in run_log.md now.'

echo 'LOG: extract_tg done — fill D-06 (fit quality, R², Tg K) and the Tg row in RESULTS in run_log.md. Also compute and record cooling_rate_K_per_ns = (T_start - T_end) / (n_stages × n_steps × timestep_fs × 1e-6) from the Tg sweep stages.json and fill the cooling rate row in RESULTS.'
echo 'LOG: extract_equilibrated_density done — fill the ρ row in RESULTS in run_log.md now.'
echo 'LOG: extract_bulk_modulus done — fill the K row in RESULTS in run_log.md now.'
